text: This is just a picture of an example of a setup for a robotic lobectomy.
Again, this is a right side so the
Ports are placed such that the assistant port is triangulated between arms three and four.
If doing a left side, the assistant port would be triangulated between arms one and two.

In general, when we start our lobectomies, we start with our posterior mediastinal dissection by taking down the inferior pulmonary ligament, dissecting out the posterior mediastinum, dissecting out the level seven lymph node packet, and then dissecting onto the artery, the main pulmonary artery and dissecting out level six, as well as five lymph nodes.
